title: Simple Cheese
description: A mod that adds cheese to minecraft
body:
Simple Cheese - a mod that adds cheese to the game. With just a bucket of milk, a cauldron and a fire under it, you can make cheese yourself, but be careful, because if you don't get it out of the cauldron in time, it will turn into poisonous cheese


To make cheese, you need to create a structure that includes:
- fire or campfire on x, y, z
- a cauldron with milk on x, y+1 , z
- after 3 minutes it will turn into cheese
